reviews.comment:
La chica que me atendio para comprar le pedi una factura A no me la dio. Encima me dio la mitas del pedido. Y bastante lerda para todo.

(Translated by Google)
The girl who helped me with my purchase asked for an invoice, but she didn't give it to me. On top of that, she gave me half the order. And she's quite slow about everything.
